config-cli/src/test/java/de/adorsys/keyc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
config-cli/src/test/java/de/adorsys/keyc.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0 on non-empty lists, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or validate against Java 21 APIs and syntax.
